description.en: This attribute defines where the gradient stop is placed along the gradient vector.Value type:<number>|<percentage>;Default value:0;Animatable:yes

description.en: This attribute defines the orientation of the marker relative to the shape it is attached to.Value type:auto|auto-start-reverse|<angle>;Default value:0;Animatable:yes
